name: Sandtortchen (Sand Tarts)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the sugar and butter until light and fluffy.
2. Beat in the 2 eggs, one at a time, ensuring each is fully incorporated.
3. Gradually blend in the flour alternately with the beaten egg whites, mixing until just combined.
4. Chill the dough for at least 24 hours to firm up.
5. On a well-floured surface, roll out the dough as thinly as possible.
6. Cut into diamond shapes using a knife. Place the cut cookies on greased cookie sheets.
7. Brush each cookie with beaten egg white.
8. Sprinkle with sugar and a pinch of cinnamon.
9. Place a pecan half in the center of each cookie.
10. Bake at 350 degrees F (175 degrees C) for 8 to 10 minutes, or until the edges are lightly browned.
11. Allow cookies to cool on the sheets for 1 minute before transferring them to wire racks.
12. Store in airtight tins.
